comment: Synthetic metastatic NSCLC adenocarcinoma, male 49, ROS1 fusion (CD74-ROS1) discovered after 1L progression on chemo+IO (ROS1 missed on initial DNA-only NGS, found via repeat RNA-NGS). Line of therapy = 2. Engine routes ALGO-NSCLC-METASTATIC-2L step 1 (no EGFR) → step 4 (no ALK) → step 6 (ROS1 fires) → step 7 (no G2032R) → IND-NSCLC-2L-ROS1-POST-CRIZ-ENTRECTINIB (entrectinib for CNS-active disease, integrated ORR 67%, intracranial ORR 79%).

prior_lines.outcome: PD; ROS1 fusion identified on RNA-NGS rebiopsy
